full_text:
Zhang Tao
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Tao. Allied with Lady Guo and accused Empress Zhen of black magic with intent to hurt Cao Pi. Zhang Tao is a fictional character. Zhang Tao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
